subject: Welcome Aboard!
body:
Dear new team member,

Welcome to the team! We are thrilled to have you join us. We look forward to working with you.

Best regards,
The Team

subject: Welcome to Amzur AI Chat, Bravi006 🎉
body: Welcome to Amzur AI Chat! Open the email in an HTML-capable client to view the full message.

subject: Follow-up to your onboarding
body:
Hi,

This is a follow-up to your recent onboarding. We hope you're settling in well.

Best regards,
The Team
